description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a job named build that uses the alpine:edge Docker image and runs the following script lines in order: echo '@testing http://nl.alpinelinux.org/alpine/edge/testing' >> /etc/apk/repositories; apk update && apk upgrade; apk add abuild build-base cabal cmark@testing ghc git gmp-dev icu libffi linux-headers musl-dev pcre sudo zlib zlib-dev; cp 'conor@conr.ca-584aeee5.rsa.pub' /etc/apk/keys; adduser -D -s /bin/sh -G abuild maker; chown -R maker:abuild $PWD; echo 'maker ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: ALL' >> /etc/sudoers; mkdir -p /home/maker/.abuild/; touch /home/maker/.abuild/abuild.conf; echo "PACKAGER_PRIVKEY=\"/keys/conor@conr.ca-584aeee5.rsa\"" >> /home/maker/.abuild/abuild.conf; mkdir -p /home/maker/packages; chown -R maker:abuild /home/maker/packages; mkdir -p /keys; cp 'conor@conr.ca-584aeee5.rsa.pub' /keys; echo "${abuild_key}" > '/keys/conor@conr.ca-584aeee5.rsa'; chown -R maker:abuild /keys; for dir in $(ls -d */); do dir="${dir%/}"; echo "Building ${dir}"; cd "${dir}"; sudo -u maker abuild checksum; sudo -u maker abuild -d; cd ..; done; mkdir -p $PWD/apks; cp -R /home/maker/packages/alpine-pandoc/* $PWD/apks. The job stores the apks directory as an artifact that expires in 1 day. In the deploy stage add a job named pages that uses the alpine image, runs only on the master branch, depends on the build job, executes the script line 'mv apks/ public/', and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact that expires in 1 hour.
